title: Project M.Nation Zombie Survival
description:
Project M.Nation is a zombie survival modpack for Minecraft 1.20.1, focused on immersion, performance, and intense gameplay.
Explore abandoned cities, fight off hordes of infected, manage thirst and infection, and survive in a post-apocalyptic world.
body:
# рџ§џ **Project M.Nation вЂ“ A Minecraft Zombie Survival Experience**

**Project M.Nation** is a carefully crafted zombie survival modpack for Minecraft `1.20.1` that pushes you to the limits of your survival instincts.

Step into a post-apocalyptic world where the undead rule the night and the remnants of civilization are buried beneath overgrown cities, crumbling ruins, and hostile wilderness. This pack combines performance optimization, immersive visuals, and intense survival gameplay to deliver a challenging and atmospheric experience.

---
### If you are a mod developer and do not want your mod to be included in my modpack, please contact me and I will remove it as soon as possible. You can find my contact details in my [Profile](https://modrinth.com/user/Varamos)

---

## рџ”Ґ Core Features

### рџ§џ Zombie Apocalypse Mechanics
- `Contagion`, `Zombie Apocalypse Core`  
  в†’ Zombies are more dangerous than ever. Infection spreads, survival is harder, and every encounter is a threat.

### рџЊ§пёЏ Environmental Realism
- `Immersive Weathering`, `Serene Seasons`  
  в†’ Experience dynamic weather, seasonal changes, and environmental decay.
- `Sound Physics Remastered`, `Enhanced Visuals`  
  в†’ Realistic soundscapes and visual effects create a deeply immersive world.
- `Oculus`, `Camera Overhaul`  
  в†’ Shader support and third-person improvements for stunning visual fidelity.

### рџ—єпёЏ Exploration & Worldbuilding
- `Lost Cities`, `Underground Bunkers`  
  в†’ Explore abandoned cities and hidden shelters.
- `Terralith`, `Dynamic Trees`, `TerraBlender`  
  в†’ Massive terrain overhauls with biome variety and natural detail.

### рџ§Є Survival Challenges
- `Thirst`, `Cold Sweat`, `RationCraft`  
  в†’ Manage thirst, hunger, temperature, and infection.
- `Useful Backpacks`, `Get It Together Drops`  
  в†’ Smart looting, inventory management, and realistic item drops.

### вљ™пёЏ Performance & QoL
- `ModernFix`, `FerriteCore`, `Embeddium`, `Clumps`  
  в†’ Optimized for performance, even on lower-end systems.
- `Cull Leaves`, `SkinLayers3D`, `BetterF3`  
  в†’ Visual polish and user interface improvements.

### рџ§  Combat & Immersion Tools
- `Binoculars`, `Shoulder Surfing Reloaded`  
  в†’ Tactical spotting and immersive third-person perspective.
- `Just Enough Items`, `Polymorph`  
  в†’ Powerful crafting and recipe tools.
- `Simple Voice Chat`  
  в†’ Built-in multiplayer communication support.

### рџђѕ Mob & Gameplay Enhancements
- `More Mob Variants`, `KeerdmвЂ™s Zombie Essentials`  
  в†’ Undead variety and smarter behavior.
- `Not Enough Animations`  
  в†’ Smooth, immersive animations for a modern look and feel.
---
## World Setup

![Worldgenerator Setup](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1220ef88f59cd143010397652113873a9cc5018f.png)
 
By [Keerdm](https://modrinth.com/user/Keerdm)

---

## вњ… Recommended Settings

- Minecraft Version: `1.20.1` (Forge)
- RAM: **6вЂ“8GB allocated** (minimum 4GB)
- World Type: `Lost Cities` or `Terralith`
- Difficulty: **Hard** for full survival immersion
- Shaders: **Oculus-compatible** (optional but recommended)
- Best Shaders: Hysteria and Insanity

---

> **Survive the night, scavenge by day, and carve out a future in a world gone dead.**  
> *Are you ready for Project M.Nation?*
